compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for resource_exhaustion non-blocking in test gate
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh with behavioral tests verifying that pre-commit-test-gate.sh treats resource_exhaustion status as non-blocking at both checkpoints (fast-path and full-path). Tests MUST fail RED before implementation.

## Test Approach

Set up a temp git repo with staged files. Write test-gate-status with "resource_exhaustion" as first line and a valid diff_hash. Invoke pre-commit-test-gate.sh. Assert exit 0 (non-blocking).

## Test Functions

1. test_fast_path_allows_resource_exhaustion: Write test-gate-status with resource_exhaustion + matching diff_hash. Invoke gate. Assert exit 0 (fast-path: status is non-blocking + hash matches).

2. test_full_path_allows_resource_exhaustion: Write test-gate-status with resource_exhaustion + stale diff_hash (forces full-path). Verify gate does not block on the status value itself (may block on hash mismatch, but not on the status).

3. test_resource_exhaustion_emits_warning: Write test-gate-status with resource_exhaustion + matching diff_hash. Assert stderr contains a warning about resource exhaustion.

4. test_failed_status_still_blocks: Write test-gate-status with "failed" + matching diff_hash. Assert gate blocks (exit 1). Confirms resource_exhaustion is specifically non-blocking, not a blanket allow.

## Files to Modify
- tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh (CREATE)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] All tests FAIL against current code (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] No syntax errors
  Verify: bash -n tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-test-gate-resource-exhaustion.sh. Tests: RED (4 functions, 2 principal assertions fail as expected).
comments.author: Test
